title: melandrium bolanderi
intro: Melandrium bolanderi, also known as Bolander's catchfly, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Melandrium bolanderi include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
